name: Low-Fat Nilla-Nana Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and egg and blend well.
3. Add the mashed bananas, applesauce, and yogurt and stir to combine.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
6. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture and pour the wet ingredients into the well.
7. Stir until just blended. The batter will be lumpy.
8. Pour the batter evenly into two 8-cup muffin pans that have been well greased or lined with paper muffin cups.
9. Bake for 10-15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean.
10. Allow muffins to cool in the pan for 2-3 minutes before carefully removing and placing on a wire rack to cool.
